channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Microsoft emphasises worker involvement in AI adoption for fair workplace outcomes
item.description: Australia’s establishment of a national tripartite AI Employment and Workplaces Forum has been welcomed as a timely move. The initiative brings together government, employers, and unions, signalling a...

item.title: Ben Askren’s recovery journey after a double lung transplant
item.description: Former MMA fighter and Olympic wrestler Ben Askren went through a life-changing period after being diagnosed with severe pneumonia in 2025, which led to a double lung transplant. During his hospital s...

item.title: Nigeria faces rising cyberattacks weekly and urgent need for better data security
item.description: Nigeria dey face serious cyber wahala as NDPC report show say country dey experience over 4,000 cyberattacks every week. Na serious problem because e dey cost country about ₦12 billion for 2024 alone....

item.title: Lancashire council announces potential withdrawal from government refugee resettlement programmes
item.description: Lancashire County Council, currently led by Reform UK, has announced its intention to withdraw from the government-funded refugee resettlement programmes, including the UK Resettlement Scheme (UKRS) a...

item.title: Nyeri Court Grants KSh 1 Million Bond to Police Officer Accused of Karatina Businessman’s Killing
item.description: A police constable, Peter Wamiti, has appeared in Nyeri High Court denying charges of murder following the death of George Gathu, a Karatina businessman, at Rubis Petrol Station. Gathu, aged 40, was r...

item.title: Dignitaries Celebrate Mrs. Boma Ogan’s 60th Birthday in Okrika
item.description: On May 6, 2026, prominent Nigerian figures gathered to celebrate the 60th birthday of Mrs. Boma Ogan, eldest daughter of former Rivers State Governor Chief Rufus Ada George, and wife of Ambassador Ida...

item.title: US hotel demand lags expectations ahead of 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.description: Hotel bookings across major United States host cities for the 2026 FIFA World Cup are falling short of early expectations, according to a survey by the American Hotel and Lodging Association (AHLA). W...

item.title: From Kenyan TV Actor to Long-Haul Truck Driver in the US: The Story of Joakim Mwangi
item.description: Joakim Mwangi, widely known in Kenya as Katuosis from the drama series Jungu Kuu, has embarked on a completely new journey in the United States as a long-haul truck driver. At 38 years old, Mwangi has...

item.title: Researcher Highlights Security Concerns Over How Microsoft Edge Handles Passwords in Memory
item.description: A security researcher has raised concerns about how Microsoft Edge manages stored passwords in system memory (RAM). According to the findings, after a user saves a password using Edge’s built-in passw...

item.title: Israel conducts strike in Beirut amid fragile ceasefire as Hezbollah responds with drone attacks
item.description: Israel has carried out an airstrike in a suburb of Beirut, marking the first such attack in the Lebanese capital since a ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah came into effect roughly three weeks ear...

item.title: Trudeau’s EV Strategy Faces Challenges; Dutch Experts Caution on Mental Health MAID Expansion
item.description: On May 6, 2026, several key developments in Canadian politics and society were highlighted. John Ivison reports that Canada’s ambitious plan to become a hub for North American electric vehicle (EV) pr...

item.title: Seven-Year-Old Girl Found Dead in Kilifi Following Overnight Search
item.description: Kilifi residents and the family of seven-year-old Keziah Matuki are in shock and grief after the young girl, who had gone missing on the evening of May 3, was found dead in Mwenzagombe Bofa following ...

item.title: Bangladesh to Explore Teesta River Project with China Amid Delays in India Agreement
item.description: Bangladesh Foreign Minister Khalilur Rahman has stated that the country cannot simply wait for a water-sharing agreement on the Teesta river with India, emphasising that the issue is critical for comm...

item.title: China Criticises Eswatini for Hosting Taiwanese President
item.description: China has strongly criticised Eswatini for hosting Taiwanese President Lai Ching-te, accusing the small Southern African nation of being 'kept and fed' by Taiwan. The remarks reflect Beijing’s ongoing...

item.title: Australian women and children linked to ISIS return home, some to be arrested
item.description: A group of Australian women and children with connections to ISIS are expected to arrive in Sydney and Melbourne this evening after spending several years in a Syrian refugee camp. The Australian Fede...

item.title: Five Persons Killed In Late-Night Attack In Plateau State
item.description: Trouble don strike again for Plateau State as gunmen attack Nding Susut community for Barkin Ladi LGA. Police report say five people die, including four women and one small pikin of nine years, while ...

item.title: Congress to finalise Kerala CM choice by Sunday amid internal contest
item.description: In Kerala, the Congress party is heading towards a crucial decision regarding the choice of its legislature party chief, who is likely to be appointed as Chief Minister. The All India Congress Committ...

item.title: Parents raise concerns after CMHA distributes harm reduction booklet at Barrie high school
item.description: In Barrie, Ontario, parents expressed concern after the Canadian Mental Health Association (CMHA) distributed a harm reduction booklet titled “Safer Snorting” to students at Barrie North Collegiate In...

item.title: Weekly Fuel Price Update: Diesel May Drop While Gasoline Could Rise
item.description: Metro Manila fuel prices are showing mixed movements for the week of May 7, 2026. Diesel prices are expected to potentially decrease, providing some relief to transport and logistics costs, while gaso...

item.title: Eastern Cape councillor Thumeka Bikwana killed in her home
item.description: Thumeka Bikwana, a 63-year-old councillor and MMC for corporate services in the Chris Hani District Municipality, was tragically shot dead at her home in Tshatshu village, Cacadu, on Tuesday morning a...
